verdict: 2026-07-17 17:27:32 PDT — Sound and idiomatic. I would build this the same way: retain the centralized CSP array, declaratively tighten and add directives, and verify the served header with the existing native test harness. No dependency, abstraction, or code path should replace this design; adding Helmet would increase complexity without centralizing an invariant further or eliminating an error path.
